entities.name: URBAN SPRAWL
entities.description: The expansion of urban areas into surrounding rural land, exerting pressure on agriculture

entities.name: PERI-URBAN AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural activities occurring on the fringes of urban areas

entities.name: FARM DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The practice of diversifying crops or farming activities to enhance resilience and sustainability

entities.name: DIVERSIFICATION INTENSITY
entities.description: The extent or degree to which a farm is diversified

entities.name: HYDERABAD
entities.description: The city in India where the study on peri-urban farming was conducted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted

entities.name: DOUBLE HURDLE MODEL
entities.description: A statistical model used to analyze the dual decision-making process of diversification choice and intensity

entities.name: MULTI-STAGE SAMPLING METHOD
entities.description: A sampling technique used to collect survey data from farm households

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: A farm-specific resource condition that determines the intensity of diversification

entities.name: RISK PERCEPTIONS
entities.description: Farmers' subjective assessments of production and market uncertainties

entities.name: LAND REDUCTION
entities.description: A pressure exerted by urban expansion on peri-urban agriculture

entities.name: RESOURCE COMPETITION
entities.description: A pressure exerted by urban expansion on peri-urban agriculture

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL EXTERNALITIES
entities.description: Pressures resulting from urban expansion affecting agricultural systems

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of a farm to recover from shocks, enhanced by diversification

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The ability to maintain agricultural productivity and ecological balance over the long term

entities.name: SOCIO-ENVIRONMENTAL FACTORS
entities.description: Factors such as proximity to urban areas and household size that influence diversification choices

entities.name: PROXIMITY TO URBAN AREAS
entities.description: A socio-environmental factor influencing the initial decision to diversify

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD SIZE
entities.description: A socio-environmental factor influencing the initial decision to diversify

entities.name: RISK ATTITUDES
entities.description: A socio-environmental factor influencing the initial decision to diversify

entities.name: PRODUCTION UNCERTAINTIES
entities.description: Subjective assessments of production risks that influence diversification intensity

entities.name: MARKET UNCERTAINTIES
entities.description: Subjective assessments of market risks that influence diversification intensity

entities.name: RISK MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The strategic response to resource limitations and perceived risks in shaping agricultural practices
